zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Allerton於1635年出生在英國時，她的父親Rev. Bartholomew Allerton23歲，母親Sarah Fairfax22歲。她於1645年10月26日與John Thomas Tucker在美國維吉尼亞州阿爾貝馬爾威斯特摩蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年9月13日享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Allerton于1635年出生在英国时，她的父亲Rev. Bartholomew Allerton23岁，母亲Sarah Fairfax22岁。她于1645年10月26日与John Thomas Tucker在美国弗吉尼亚州阿爾貝馬爾威斯特摩蘭结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年9月13日享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of several places so called. Allerton on Merseyside, Chapel Allerton in Yorkshire, and others in Yorkshire were named in Old English as alra tūn ‘settlement by the alders’. One in Somerset (Alwarditone in Domesday Book) is ‘Ælfweard's settlement’; one in Yorkshire (Allerton Mauleverer, Alvertone in Domesday Book) is ‘Ælfhere's settlement’.

variants.name: Alderton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of a number of places called Alderton. Those in Suffolk and Shropshire (Alretuna in Domesday Book) are named with Old English alor + tūn, meaning ‘the settlement by the alders’. Those in Gloucestershire, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire are named with the Old English personal name Ealdhere, meaning ‘settlement associated with Ealdhere’. The one in Essex contains a different personal name, probably the woman's name Æthelwaru. In England, the surname is most common in East Anglia, making the places in Suffolk and Essex the most likely sources.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Allerton was born in 1635, in England, her father, Rev. Bartholomew Allerton, was 23 and her mother, Sarah Fairfax, was 22. She married John Thomas Tucker on 26 October 1645, in Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 13 September 1678, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Allerton est née en 1635, à Angleterre, son père, Rev. Bartholomew Allerton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sarah Fairfax, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Thomas Tucker le 26 octobre 1645, à Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 septembre 1678, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Allerton 1635 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rev. Bartholomew Allerton 23 und ihre Mutter Sarah Fairfax 22. Sie hat am 26. Oktober 1645 in Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten John Thomas Tucker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. September 1678 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Allerton è nata il nel 1635 nel England, sua padre, Rev. Bartholomew Allerton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Sarah Fairfax, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Thomas Tucker il 26 ottobre 1645, nel Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 settembre 1678, all'età di 43 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Allerton(이)가 1635년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rev. Bartholomew Allerton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Fairfax(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1645년 10월 26일 미국 버지니아 주 알브마일 웨스트모렐랜드에서 John Thomas Tucker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 9월 13일 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Allerton nasceu em 1635, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Rev. Bartholomew Allerton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Fairfax, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Thomas Tucker em 26 de outubro de 1645, em Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1678, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Allerton родилась в 1635 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Rev. Bartholomew Allerton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Fairfax, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas Tucker 26 октября 1645 г. в местности вестмореланд, альбемарл, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 сентября 1678 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Allerton nació en 1635, en Inglaterra, su papá, Rev. Bartholomew Allerton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sarah Fairfax, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Thomas Tucker el 26 de octubre de 1645, en Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1678, a la edad de 43 años.
